a.name: The Crowd
a.strategy: Follow consensus: YES when prob ≥65%, NO when prob ≤35%
a.thesis: Smart money is already priced in. Ride the conviction.

b.name: The Contrarian
b.strategy: Fade longshots: always NO when crowd says ≤30%
b.thesis: Crowds overprice long shots. Sell the overpriced tickets.
